IncidentDef.label: Inspiration of forge
IncidentDef.letterText: While crafting the object, one colonist's mind suddenly became clear, and he fell into a state of self-oblivion. The process at hand suddenly became orderly and beautiful, which directly inspired him.

IncidentDef.label: Black steel from space
IncidentDef.letterText: A piece of a ship falls on your colony, and unlike other ship fragments, this piece can be found in the form of a hard steel - Black steel.
